ddls:
CREATE TABLE "audio_recordings" (
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio recording */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the recording */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the recording content */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the recording */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the recording */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the recording available */,
  "buy_link" TEXT /* Link to add the recording to the shopping cart */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker of the recording */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the recording */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the recording */,
  "transcript" TEXT /* Transcript of the recording */,
  "subtitle_language" TEXT /* Language of the subtitles */,
  "is_accessible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recording is accessible to users with disabilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recording_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_recordings_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the recording */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the recording (e.g., webcast, in-person) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the recording event */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the recording (e.g., topic, theme) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the user */,
  "language_preference" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "accessibility_needs" TEXT /* Accessibility needs of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the recording ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, completed) */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES audio_recordings ("recording_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order for which the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment provider */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the recording (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or feedback from the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "not_helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review not helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES audio_recordings ("recording_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cart" (
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the item to the cart */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording in the cart */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the recording in the cart */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the item was added to the cart */,
  "is_saved_for_later" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is saved for later */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES audio_recordings ("recording_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wishlist" (
  "wishlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wishlist item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the item to the wishlist */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording in the wishlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the item was added to the wishlist */,
  "is_saved_for_later" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is saved for later */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wishlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlist_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES audio_recordings ("recording_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlist_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording downloaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who downloaded the recording */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date the recording was downloaded */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the recording has been downloaded by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES audio_recordings ("recording_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage discount offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "code" TEXT /* Unique code for the promotion */,
  "minimum_purchase_amount" TEXT /* Minimum purchase amount required to apply the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recording_promotions" (
  "recording_promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between a recording and a promotion */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Fixed discount amount for the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recording_promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recording_promotions_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES audio_recordings ("recording_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recording_promotions_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
